01 Independent Practice

An independent voice
in hospitality
technology.

A Swiss-domiciled consulting practice and umbrella entity, founded and led by Marco Rosso. Operator-practitioner expertise — built inside the industry, refined by a decade scaling US SaaS commercial teams, deployed from Lugano.

Practice Independent
Domicile Lugano, CH
Working in EN · IT · ES
Active since 2026
02

Practice

Rosso Consulting operates across four lanes. Services are outcome-led, not productised — but the four lanes describe how work is structured and contracted.

01.

Consulting Engagements

Defined client projects with explicit scope, deliverables, and timeline. Strategic advisory, technology audits, transformation programs, AI deployment design, commercial operating models.

Strategic advisoryStack auditsTransformation programsFractional commercial leadership
02.

Advisory Roles

Formal advisory board or strategic advisor positions with hospitality technology companies. Long-form relationships, regular cadence, mix of cash, equity, and in-kind structures.

Board seatsStrategic GTM advisorPre-seed and seed
03.

Expert Network & Investor Work

Paid consultations for VC, PE, and corporate investors evaluating the hospitality technology sector. Single calls through major expert networks; longer retained relationships for thesis development.

Due diligence callsMarket mappingThesis pressure-testing
04.

Operating Ventures

Companies built or operated under the Rosso Consulting umbrella. Ventures carry the parent endorsement — "a Rosso Consulting company" — while maintaining their own brand and commercial autonomy.

Astia Web (current)Spinout architecture
See how we work →
03

Who we serve

SaaS Founders

Pre-seed to Series C founders building hospitality and travel software. Advisory, GTM, fractional commercial leadership.

VC & PE Investors

Funds evaluating travel and hospitality tech. Due diligence, market mapping, thesis development.

Hotel Operators

Independent groups and family-owned operators. Digital transformation, AI deployment, technology stack work.

Peer Operators

C-suite peers and industry events. Speaking, thought leadership, community contribution.

04

Active engagements

Four active advisory roles in hospitality technology, plus the firm's first operating venture. The portfolio is curated; positions are accepted only where the relationship offers strategic alignment with the wider practice.

Advisory Board

LobbyAI

AI-native hospitality startup, pre-seed stage. GTM, sales and strategy support.

GTM Strategic Advisor

Canary Technologies

Established hospitality SaaS, post Series D. EU expansion and partnerships.

Advisory Board

Room Price Genie

Revenue management SaaS for independent hotels. Product direction and industry trends.

Advisory Board

SnapFix

Operations and facilities management SaaS for hotels and adjacent verticals.

View advisory portfolio →
05

Operating now

Primary Role

Chief Digital Strategy
& Business Automation Officer

Planhotel Hospitality Group — Swiss-Italian hotel group, 11 properties across three brands operating in Zanzibar, the Maldives, and Kenya.

Why it matters

Marco's operator role is current and active. Every recommendation made in consulting and advisory work passes a single test: would he deploy this in a property he runs? The operator seat is not a credential to be cited — it is the working environment from which the practice is delivered.

Start a conversation

Ready to talk.
Engagement scoping starts with a single call. No fees apply to initial conversations.
